name: client-acquisition
description: Full-funnel client acquisition system for any service business. ICP building, lead gen, outreach sequencing, qualification, closing, and retention.
author: KOINO Capital

commands.prospect: Research and score a prospect against your ICP
commands.qualify: Score a lead using BANT/MEDDIC frameworks
commands.propose: Generate a 60-second proposal for a qualified lead
commands.onboard: Create onboarding workflow for a new client
commands.health: Score client health and detect churn/upsell signals
commands.pipeline: Full pipeline audit — stages, velocity, bottlenecks
commands.icp: Build or refine your Ideal Client Profile
commands.casestudy: Generate case study from client results
